posts.title: Where the site stands, before the refresh
posts.summary: A deliberate 'before' snapshot of pdoom1.com at the start of a UI refresh - what's working (the Risk Dashboard), what reads as dated (blanket monospace, no shared layout spine), and the correctness bugs fixed the same day.

posts.title: Website Development Sprint Complete: v0.2.0 Major Enhancement
posts.summary: Completed comprehensive 6-hour development sprint delivering major website enhancements across three phases: game asset integration, blog system overhaul, and UI polish. Transformed the website from a basic landing page into a professional developer showcase.

posts.title: Architecture Revolution: From Monolith to Modular Excellence
posts.summary: A comprehensive look at our systematic approach to breaking down 4,235+ line monoliths into clean, maintainable modules - featuring real metrics and engineering insights from the trenches

posts.title: UI Monolith Breakdown Complete - Architecture Transformation
posts.summary: Completed systematic breakdown of 4,235-line UI monolith into 8 specialized modules, achieving 37.1% reduction with zero functionality regression

posts.title: Multi-Repository Integration System Complete
posts.summary: Completed comprehensive multi-repository integration system establishing professional automation and documentation management across pdoom1, pdoom1-website, and pdoom-data repositories with zero-manual-overhead release process.

posts.title: Monolith Breakdown: Tutorial Extraction & Legacy Cleanup
posts.summary: Extracted 486 lines of tutorial functions, removed 151 lines of legacy code, and fixed critical hover tooltips bug

posts.title: Complete Deterministic RNG System v0.6.0
posts.summary: MAJOR MILESTONE: Transform P(Doom) into fully deterministic competitive gaming platform with perfect reproducibility

posts.title: p(Doom)1 Website Release - Deployment Infrastructure Complete
posts.summary: Successfully implemented and documented the complete deployment pipeline for the p(Doom)1 website with GitHub Actions workflow

posts.title: Enhanced Leaderboard System v0.4.1: Seed Competition
posts.summary: Major competitive gaming milestone: seed-specific leaderboards, lab name integration, bootstrap economic model, and comprehensive session tracking

posts.title: P(Doom) v0.3.0: Consolidated Feature Release
posts.summary: Major consolidated release featuring longtermist 5-digit year dates, accessibility framework, comprehensive bug sweep plan, and systematic branch merge for alpha readiness

posts.title: Debug Console System
posts.summary: Added real-time debug console with backtick toggle for game state monitoring

posts.title: P(Doom) v0.2.12: Development Infrastructure
posts.summary: Major version release featuring comprehensive type annotations and development tooling infrastructure

posts.title: Type Annotation Sprint: game_state.py Near Completion
posts.summary: Completed 85-90% of game_state.py type annotations with 25+ methods annotated across core systems

posts.title: Major Type Annotation Milestone: UI and GameState Complete
posts.summary: Completed comprehensive type annotations for ui.py and 60% of game_state.py, resolving 1,100-1,600 pylance issues
